metadata.description: ARC-1 — SAP ABAP development tools for Claude Code (MCP server + SAP skills).

plugins.name: arc-1
plugins.description: SAP ABAP development for Claude Code: the ARC-1 MCP server (read/write/search/activate/lint/diagnose ABAP via ADT) plus best-practice skills for RAP, CDS, ABAP Unit, clean-core, and UI5 modernization. Read-only by default.
